ground_truth.reason: Alice has IAM permission and role trust for env13-admin, but an Env13-specific SCP attached to the member account denies sts:AssumeRole with Resource * for the target path while carving out the collection caller.

required_scp.resource_scope: wildcard Resource * with ArnNotLike aws:PrincipalArn carveout for the management collection caller

extra_findings_policy: Extra non-target findings are noise unless they validate admin_reachability for env13-alice -> env13-admin or prevent the required blocked target finding.
